description.main: Enjoy clear, balanced sound with the Galaxy Buds4. Ultra-High Quality (UHQ) audio brings you rich detail that reveals every subtle layer of your favourite tracks. Active Noise Cancellation keeps the noisy world where it belongs - outside - so you can get stuck into your playlist. The Buds4 are tuned in to more than just sound, they sense movement too.
goodToKnow: Live Translate lets you receive real-time translations in 22 languages
Super wideband calling locks onto your voice to keep conversations crisp
The metal blade design houses responsive touch controls for volume and playback
The Galaxy Wearable app lets you customise controls, get updates and check battery levels
IP54 resistance is built to handle dust, splashes and drizzle
The charging case gives you up to 30 hours of battery life
